controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - classification, valuation, and operation of investment portfolio) directions, 2
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment
Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - classification, valuation, and operation of investment portfolio) directions, 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect from the date of issue
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect from the date of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect from the date of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an nbfc): i
controls.control_description:
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to following Non-Banking Financial
Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as
an NBFC):
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an nbfc): i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to comply with the provisions of chapter ii, nbfcs in the middle layer (nbfcs-ml), and nbfcs placed in the upper layer (nbfcs-ul) shall co
controls.control_description:
(2) NBFCs classified under the Base Layer (NBFCs-BL) shall be required to
comply with the provisions of Chapter II, NBFCs in the Middle Layer
(NBFCs-ML), and NBFCs placed in the Upper Layer (NBFCs-UL) shall
comply with Chapters II and III.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to comply with the provisions of chapter ii, nbfcs in the middle layer (nbfcs-ml), and nbfcs placed in the upper layer (nbfcs-ul) shall co

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to 2[nbfc holding certificate of registration as 'type i nbfc'], and 'nbfcs-bl having customer interface but not availing public funds'
controls.control_description:
Provided that paragraphs 11 to 13, and paragraphs 28 to 29, shall be
applicable to 2[NBFC holding Certificate of Registration as 'Type I NBFC'], and
'NBFCs-BL having customer interface but not availing public funds'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to 2[nbfc holding certificate of registration as 'type i nbfc'], and 'nbfcs-bl having customer interface but not availing public funds'

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'carrying cost' means book value of the assets and interest accrued thereon but not received
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Carrying Cost' means book value of the assets and interest accrued
thereon but not received.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'carrying cost' means book value of the assets and interest accrued thereon but not received

controls.control_objective: To ensure an investment which is by its nature readily realisable and is intended to be held for not more than one year from the date on which such investment i
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Current Investment' means an investment which is by its nature readily
realisable and is intended to be held for not more than one year from the
date on which such investment is made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an investment which is by its nature readily realisable and is intended to be held for not more than one year from the date on which such investment i

controls.control_objective: To ensure an investment other than a current investment
controls.control_description:
(3) Long Term Investment' means an investment other than a current
investment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an investment other than a current investment

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as specified in the sebi circular sebi/ho/afd-1/pod/p/cir/2022/157 dated november 23, 2022
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Priority distribution model' shall have the same meaning as specified in
the SEBI circular SEBI/HO/AFD-1/PoD/P/CIR/2022/157 dated November
23, 2022.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as specified in the sebi circular sebi/ho/afd-1/pod/p/cir/2022/157 dated november 23, 2022

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the br act, the rbi act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the BR Act, the RBI Act, rules / regulations
made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as
used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the br act, the rbi act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare its financial statements in accordance with ind as notified by the government of india and shall comply with the regulatory guidance specified
controls.control_description:
An NBFC covered by Rule 4 of the Companies (Indian Accounting Standards)
Rules, 2015, ('Ind AS') shall prepare its financial statements in accordance with
Ind AS notified by the Government of India and shall comply with the regulatory
guidance specified in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions,
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare its financial statements in accordance with ind as notified by the government of india and shall comply with the regulatory guidance specified

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the requirements of accounting standards notified under the companies (accounting standards) rules, 2021, as amended from time to time, in
controls.control_description:
Other NBFCs shall comply with the requirements of Accounting
Standards notified under the Companies (Accounting Standards) Rules, 2021,
as amended from time to time, insofar as they are not inconsistent with any of
the Directions / Guidelines issued by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the requirements of accounting standards notified under the companies (accounting standards) rules, 2021, as amended from time to time, in

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame investment policy for the company and shall implement the same
controls.control_description:
The Board of Directors (Board) of an NBFC shall frame investment policy for
the company and shall implement the same.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame investment policy for the company and shall implement the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure be spelt out by the board of the company in the investment policy
controls.control_description:
The criteria for classification of investments as per applicable accounting
standards shall be spelt out by the Board of the company in the investment
policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be spelt out by the board of the company in the investment policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as per the applicable accounting standards, at the time of making each investment
controls.control_description:
Investments in securities shall be classified as per the applicable accounting
standards, at the time of making each investment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as per the applicable accounting standards, at the time of making each investment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no such transfer on ad-hoc basis
controls.control_description:
For a non-Ind AS NBFC, in case of inter-class transfer:
(1) There shall be no such transfer on ad-hoc basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no such transfer on ad-hoc basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be affected only at the beginning of each half year, on april 1 or october 1, with the approval of the board
controls.control_description:
(2) Such transfer, if warranted, shall be affected only at the beginning of each
half year, on April 1 or October 1, with the approval of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be affected only at the beginning of each half year, on april 1 or october 1, with the approval of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transferred scrip-wise, from current to long term or vice-versa, at book value or market value, whichever is lower
controls.control_description:
(3) The investments shall be transferred scrip-wise, from current to long term or
vice-versa, at book value or market value, whichever is lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transferred scrip-wise, from current to long term or vice-versa, at book value or market value, whichever is lower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully provided for and appreciation
controls.control_description:
(4) The depreciation, if any, in each scrip shall be fully provided for and
appreciation, if any, shall be ignored.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully provided for and appreciation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be set off against appreciation in another scrip, at the time of such inter-class transfer, even in respect of the scrips of the same category
controls.control_description:
<image>
(5) The depreciation in one scrip shall not be set off against appreciation in
another scrip, at the time of such inter-class transfer, even in respect of the
scrips of the same category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be set off against appreciation in another scrip, at the time of such inter-class transfer, even in respect of the scrips of the same category

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake transactions in government securities through its gilt account or its demat account or any other account, as permitted by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall undertake transactions in Government Securities through its gilt
account or its demat account or any other account, as permitted by the Reserve
Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake transactions in government securities through its gilt account or its demat account or any other account, as permitted by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the guidelines on transactions in government securities as provided in the circulars 'transactions in government securities' dated march 29, 20
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall follow the guidelines on transactions in Government Securities
as provided in the circulars 'Transactions in Government Securities' dated
March 29, 2004, 'Sale of securities allotted in Primary issues', 'Government
Securities Transactions - T+1 Settlement', both dated May 11, 2005, and
Repurchase Transactions (Repo) (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2018.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to follow the guidelines on transactions in government securities as provided in the circulars 'transactions in government securities' dated march 29, 20

controls.control_objective: To ensure report its secondary market otc trades in corporate bonds within 15 minutes of the trade on any of the stock exchanges (nse, bse, and mcx-sx)
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall report its secondary market OTC trades in corporate bonds
within 15 minutes of the trade on any of the stock exchanges (NSE, BSE, and
MCX-SX).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report its secondary market otc trades in corporate bonds within 15 minutes of the trade on any of the stock exchanges (nse, bse, and mcx-sx)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adhered to in this regard
controls.control_description:
The provisions of the circular 'FIMMDA's Trade Reporting and
Confirmation platform for OTC transactions in Corporate Bonds and Securitized
Debt Instruments' dated February 24, 2014, as amended from time to time,
shall be adhered to in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adhered to in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure , for the purpose of valuation, be grouped into the following categories, viz
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , for the purpose of valuation, be grouped into the following categories, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at cost or market value whichever is lower
controls.control_description:
Quoted current investments for each category shall be valued at cost or market
value whichever is lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at cost or market value whichever is lower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered scrip-wise and the cost and market value aggregated for all investments in each category
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, the investments in each category
shall be considered scrip-wise and the cost and market value aggregated for all
investments in each category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered scrip-wise and the cost and market value aggregated for all investments in each category

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided for or charged to the profit and loss account
controls.control_description:
If the aggregate market value for the category is
less than the aggregate cost for that category, the net depreciation shall be
provided for or charged to the Profit and Loss Account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided for or charged to the profit and loss account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ignored
controls.control_description:
If the aggregate market
value for the category exceeds the aggregate cost for the category, the net
appreciation shall be ignored.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ignored

controls.control_objective: To ensure be set off against appreciation in another category
controls.control_description:
Depreciation in one category of investments shall
not be set off against appreciation in another category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be set off against appreciation in another category

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at cost or break-up value, whichever is lower
controls.control_description:
Unquoted equity shares in the nature of current investments shall be valued at
cost or break-up value, whichever is lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at cost or break-up value, whichever is lower

controls.control_objective: To ensure substitute fair value for the break-up value of the shares
controls.control_description:
However, an NBFC may substitute
fair value for the break-up value of the shares, if considered necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to substitute fair value for the break-up value of the shares

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at ₹1 only
controls.control_description:
Where
the Balance Sheet of the investee company is not available for two years, such
shares shall be valued at ₹1 only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at ₹1 only

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at cost or face value, whichever is lower
controls.control_description:
Unquoted preference shares in the nature of current investments shall be
valued at cost or face value, whichever is lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at cost or face value, whichever is lower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at carrying cost
controls.control_description:
Investments in unquoted Government Securities or Government guaranteed
bonds shall be valued at carrying cost.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at carrying cost

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at the net asset value (nav) declared by the mutual fund in respect of each particular scheme
controls.control_description:
Unquoted investments in the units of mutual funds in the nature of current
investments shall be valued at the Net Asset Value (NAV) declared by the
mutual fund in respect of each particular scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at the net asset value (nav) declared by the mutual fund in respect of each particular scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at carrying cost
controls.control_description: Commercial Papers shall be valued at carrying cost.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at carrying cost

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued in accordance with the applicable accounting standards
controls.control_description:
A long-term investment shall be valued in accordance with the applicable
Accounting Standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued in accordance with the applicable accounting standards

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as term loans or other type of credit facilities depending upon the tenure of such debentures for the purpose of income recognition and ass
controls.control_description:
Note: Unquoted debentures shall be treated as term loans or other type of credit
facilities depending upon the tenure of such debentures for the purpose of income
recognition and asset classification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as term loans or other type of credit facilities depending upon the tenure of such debentures for the purpose of income recognition and ass

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account on cash basis
controls.control_description:
Income from dividend on shares of corporate bodies and units of mutual funds
shall be taken into account on cash basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account on cash basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account on accrual basis when such dividend has been declared by the corporate body in its annual general meeting and the nbfc's right t
controls.control_description:
<image>
Provided that the income from dividend on shares of corporate bodies shall be
taken into account on accrual basis when such dividend has been declared by
the corporate body in its annual general meeting and the NBFC's right to
receive payment is established.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account on accrual basis when such dividend has been declared by the corporate body in its annual general meeting and the nbfc's right t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account on accrual basis
controls.control_description:
Income from bonds and debentures of corporate bodies and from Government
Securities / bonds shall be taken into account on accrual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account on accrual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure the interest rate on these instruments is pre-determined and interest is serviced regularly and is not in arrears
controls.control_description:
Provided that the interest rate on these instruments is pre-determined and
interest is serviced regularly and is not in arrears.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the interest rate on these instruments is pre-determined and interest is serviced regularly and is not in arrears

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account on accrual basis
controls.control_description:
Income on securities of corporate bodies or public-sector undertakings, the
payment of interest and repayment of principal of which have been guaranteed
by Central Government or a State Government shall be taken into account on
accrual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account on accrual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean any company to which the nbfc currently has or previously had a loan or investment exposure anytime during the preceding 12 months
controls.control_description:
Explanation: For this purpose, the debtor company shall mean any
company to which the NBFC currently has or previously had a loan or
investment exposure anytime during the preceding 12 months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean any company to which the nbfc currently has or previously had a loan or investment exposure anytime during the preceding 12 months

controls.control_objective: To ensure liquidate its investment in such scheme within 30 days from the date of such downstream investment by the aif
controls.control_description:
(2) Where an AIF scheme, in which an NBFC is already an investor, makes a
downstream investment in a debtor company of the NBFC, the NBFC shall
liquidate its investment in such scheme within 30 days from the date of such
downstream investment by the AIF.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to liquidate its investment in such scheme within 30 days from the date of such downstream investment by the aif

controls.control_objective: To ensure forthwith arrange to advise the aifs suitably in the matter
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall forthwith arrange to
advise the AIFs suitably in the matter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to forthwith arrange to advise the aifs suitably in the matter

controls.control_objective: To ensure make 100 per cent provision on such investments
controls.control_description:
(3) Where an NBFC is not able to liquidate its investment within the period
specified under sub-paragraph (2) above, the NBFC shall make 100 per
cent provision on such investments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make 100 per cent provision on such investments

controls.control_objective: To ensure invest in any scheme of an aif which has downstream investments, either directly or indirectly, in its debtor company
controls.control_description:
Prohibition on investments linked to debtor companies:
(1) An NBFC shall not invest in any scheme of an AIF which has downstream
investments, either directly or indirectly, in its debtor company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invest in any scheme of an aif which has downstream investments, either directly or indirectly, in its debtor company

controls.control_objective: To ensure be excluded from this prohibition
controls.control_description:
Provided that downstream investments in equity shares of the debtor
company shall be excluded from this prohibition;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be excluded from this prohibition

controls.control_objective: To ensure be covered
controls.control_description:
however, all other forms
of investments, including investments in hybrid instruments, shall be
covered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be covered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to full deduction from capital funds of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
Treatment of investment in subordinated units of AIFs with 'priority distribution
model':
(1) Investment by an NBFC in the subordinated units of any AIF scheme with a
'priority distribution model' shall be subject to full deduction from capital
funds of the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to full deduction from capital funds of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure take place equally from both tier 1 and tier 2 capital
controls.control_description:
Such deduction from capital shall take place equally
from both Tier 1 and Tier 2 capital;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take place equally from both tier 1 and tier 2 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply only where the aif does not have any downstream investment in a debtor company of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
(2) The provisions of this paragraph shall apply only where the AIF does not
have any downstream investment in a debtor company of the NBFC;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply only where the aif does not have any downstream investment in a debtor company of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to comply with paragraph 25 above, in addition to paragraph 26(1)
controls.control_description:
and
(3) Where an NBFC invests in subordinated units of an AIF scheme, which also
has downstream exposure to the debtor company, the NBFC shall be
required to comply with paragraph 25 above, in addition to paragraph 26(1).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to comply with paragraph 25 above, in addition to paragraph 26(1)

controls.control_objective: To ensure participate in the designated currency futures exchanges recognized by sebi as clients
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall participate in the designated currency futures exchanges
recognized by SEBI as clients, subject to RBI's (Financial Market Regulation
Department) guidelines in the matter, only for the purpose of hedging its
underlying forex exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to participate in the designated currency futures exchanges recognized by sebi as clients

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made in the balance sheet relating to transactions undertaken in the currency futures market, in accordance with the guidelines issued by sebi
controls.control_description:
Disclosures shall be made in the Balance Sheet
relating to transactions undertaken in the currency futures market, in
accordance with the guidelines issued by SEBI.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be made in the balance sheet relating to transactions undertaken in the currency futures market, in accordance with the guidelines issued by sebi

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the data in this regard half yearly, in the prescribed format, to the regional office of the department of supervision of the reserve bank in w
controls.control_description:
An NBFC participating in
IRF exchanges shall submit the data in this regard half yearly, in the prescribed
format, to the Regional Office of the Department of Supervision of the Reserve
Bank in whose jurisdiction its company is registered, within a period of one
month from the close of the half year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the data in this regard half yearly, in the prescribed format, to the regional office of the department of supervision of the reserve bank in w

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfc- ml and nbfc-ul in addition to those contained in chapter ii above
controls.control_description:
Regulatory instructions specified in this Chapter shall be applicable to NBFC-
ML and NBFC-UL in addition to those contained in Chapter II above, unless
stated otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfc- ml and nbfc-ul in addition to those contained in chapter ii above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to participate in repo transactions in corporate debt securities
controls.control_description:
A Non-deposit taking NBFC shall be eligible to participate in repo transactions
in corporate debt securities, subject to compliance with the Repurchase
Transactions (Repo) (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2018, and the following
provisions:
(1) Capital Adequacy
Risk weights for credit risk for assets that are the collateral for such
transactions as well as risk weights for the counterparty credit risk shall be
assigned in accordance with the provisions applicable to the issuer/
counterparty under Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to participate in repo transactions in corporate debt securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified in the relevant schedules of the financial statements, in the same manner as applicable to banks
controls.control_description:
(2) Classification of balances in the accounts
Balances in repo account, reverse repo account, and other related
accounts shall be classified in the relevant schedules of the financial
statements, in the same manner as applicable to banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified in the relevant schedules of the financial statements, in the same manner as applicable to banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the directions and guidelines issued by financial markets regulation department (fmrd) of rbi
controls.control_description:
In all other matters related to repo transactions in corporate debt securities, a
non-deposit taking NBFC, shall follow the Directions and guidelines issued by
Financial Markets Regulation Department (FMRD) of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to follow the directions and guidelines issued by financial markets regulation department (fmrd) of rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to participate in the designated currency options exchanges recognized by sebi, as client
controls.control_description:
A Non-deposit taking NBFC shall be eligible to participate in the designated
currency options exchanges recognized by SEBI, as client, subject to the
guidelines of FMRD, RBI, only for the purpose of hedging its underlying forex
exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to participate in the designated currency options exchanges recognized by sebi, as client

controls.control_objective: To ensure make appropriate disclosures in the balance sheet regarding transactions undertaken, in accordance with the guidelines issued by sebi
controls.control_description:
Such an NBFC shall make appropriate disclosures in the Balance
Sheet regarding transactions undertaken, in accordance with the guidelines
issued by SEBI.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to make appropriate disclosures in the balance sheet regarding transactions undertaken, in accordance with the guidelines issued by sebi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to participate in the interest rate futures market permitted on recognized stock exchanges as a trading member
controls.control_description:
A Non-deposit taking NBFC shall be eligible to participate in the interest rate
futures market permitted on recognized stock exchanges as a trading member,
subject to adherence to instructions contained in Rupee Interest Rate
Derivatives (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2019.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to participate in the interest rate futures market permitted on recognized stock exchanges as a trading member

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The instructions and guidelines already repealed shall
continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
